model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Beta project card
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (194,92) said dx=234 dy=152 conf=1.00 -> (428,244)
  iter 1: at (428,244) said dx=-41 dy=36 conf=1.00 -> (387,280)
Call report_offset().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the "Beta" project card.
Looking at the image, the Beta card is the second one in the top row.
The red crosshair is currently at (387, 280) based on the previous iterations.
Wait, the prompt says the current predicted click position is shown by a red crosshair.
Looking at the image, the red crosshair is inside the Beta card, but it's towards the bottom edge of the card.
The center of the Beta card seems to be higher.
Let's estimate the center of the Beta card.
Beta card boundaries:
Left: ~268
Right: ~502
Top: ~184
Bottom: ~375
Center X: (268 + 502) / 2 = 385
Center Y: (184 + 375) / 2 = 279.5

Wait, the red crosshair is at (387, 280).
Let me re-examine the red crosshair position in the image.
The red crosshair is at (387, 280).
The center of the card is roughly where the text "Beta" and "Backend API..." are.
The crosshair is below the text.
Actually, looking closely at the image, the crosshair is quite close to the center.
Let's re-estimate.
Card top: ~184
Card bottom: ~375
Card height: 191
Card center Y: 184 + 191/2 = 184 + 95.5 = 279.5
Card left: ~268
Card right: ~502
Card width: 234
Card center X: 268 + 234/2 = 268 + 117 = 385

The current crosshair is at (387, 280).
This is extremely close to the calculated center (385, 279.5).
dx = 385 - 387 = -2
dy = 279.5 - 280 = -0.5
Since it's within a few pixels, I should report dx=0, dy=0.
